class ParagraphAnalyzer:
    """
    Reconstruct logical paragraphs from the lines inside a PDF text block.
    Version 2 rules:
    - Blank lines separate paragraphs.
    - Major font-size changes separate paragraphs.
    - Consecutive wrapped lines remain in the same paragraph.
    """
    FONT_SIZE_TOLERANCE = 0.5

    pagination over normal Word paragraph reflow.

class BlockType(str, Enum):
    """
    Logical type of a text block.
    """
    PARAGRAPH = "paragraph"
    HEADING = "heading"
    SUBTITLE = "subtitle"
    PAGE_NUMBER = "page_number"
    UNKNOWN = "unknown"

class BaseElement:
    """
    Base class for every element in a document.
    """
    page_number: int
    left: float
    top: float
    right: float
    bottom: float

label: Block
peekOfCode:
class Block(BaseElement):
    """
    Base class for page blocks.
    """
    block_number: int

label: Document
peekOfCode:
class Document:
    """
    Complete document.
    """
    metadata: PDFMetadata
    pages: list[Page] = field(default_factory=list)
    statistics: DocumentStatistics = field(
        default_factory=DocumentStatistics
    )

label: DocumentStatistics
peekOfCode:
class DocumentStatistics:
    """
    Global statistics about a document.
    """
    largest_font_size: float = 0.0
    smallest_font_size: float = 0.0
    most_common_font_size: float = 0.0
    average_line_height: float = 0.0
    average_block_gap: float = 0.0

label: PDFMetadata

class PDFMetadata:
    title: str = ""
    author: str = ""
    subject: str = ""

    modification_date: str = ""

class Page:
    """
    Represents a single page in the document.

    blocks: list[TextBlock] = field(

    )

label: Paragraph
peekOfCode:
class Paragraph:
    """
    Logical paragraph reconstructed from one or more PDF lines.
    """
    lines: list[Line] = field(default_factory=list)
    text: str = ""
    style: ParagraphStyle = field(
        default_factory=ParagraphStyle
    )

class ParagraphStyle:

    left_indent: float = 0
    right_indent: float = 0
    first_line_indent: float = 0
    spacing_before: float = 0
    spacing_after: float = 0
    line_spacing: float = 1.0

label: TableCell
peekOfCode:
class TableCell(BaseElement):
    """
    Represents one detected table cell.
    """
    row_index: int
    column_index: int
    text: str = ""
    row_span: int = 1
    column_span: int = 1
    fill_color: str | None = None

label: TextBlock
peekOfCode:
class TextBlock(Block):
    """
    Represents a block containing text.
    """
    lines: list[Line] = field(default_factory=list)
    paragraphs: list[Paragraph] = field(default_factory=list)
    block_type: BlockType = BlockType.UNKNOWN

label: TextRun
peekOfCode:
class TextRun:
    """
    Represents a logical Word run.
    Consecutive PDF spans with identical visible formatting
    are merged into one TextRun.
    """
    text: str
    font_name: str
    font_size: float
    color: RGBColor

label: PDFReader
peekOfCode:
class PDFReader:
    """
    Responsible only for opening PDF documents.
    """
    def open(self, pdf_path: str):
        """
        Open a PDF file and return the PyMuPDF document object.
        """
        document = fitz.open(pdf_path)
        return document
